headline: Palestine Position Linked to RM3.2 Billion Trade Impact
context: Malaysia strong pro-Palestine stance led to estimated RM3.2 billion trade reduction with Israel-aligned countries in 2025.

cards.big: Pro-Palestine stance linked to RM3.2 billion trade impact in 2025
cards.sub: Boycott campaigns and diplomatic tensions affected tech and agriculture

cards.big: Boycott of 28 Israel-linked brands reduced their local revenue RM1.8 billion
cards.sub: McDonalds and Starbucks franchises reported 25-40% revenue declines

cards.big: Tech sector lost RM850 million in contracts citing political risk
cards.sub: 3 semiconductor firms paused expansion plans over uncertainty

cards.big: Malaysia donated RM280 million humanitarian aid making it ASEAN top donor
cards.sub: Government dispatched 8 aid shipments and maintained field hospital

cards.big: Palestine policy tests whether principled foreign positions have managed economic consequences
Palestine solidarity linked to RM3.2 billion trade impact. Values-based foreign policy has measurable economic costs.
